en: And you were dead in the trespasses and sins
zh: 你們因著自己的過犯和罪惡，原是死的。

en: in which you once walked, following the course of this world, following the prince of the power of the air, the spirit that is now at work in the sons of disobedience-
zh: 那時你們在過犯和罪惡中行事為人，隨著時代的潮流，也服從空中掌權的首領，就是現今在悖逆的人身上運行的靈。

en: among whom we all once lived in the passions of our flesh, carrying out the desires of the body and the mind, and were by nature children of wrath, like the rest of mankind.
zh: 我們從前也都和他們在一起，放縱肉體的私慾，隨著肉體和心意所喜好的去行；我們與別人一樣，生來都是可怒的兒女。

en: But God, being rich in mercy, because of the great love with which he loved us,
zh: 然而 神滿有憐憫，因著他愛我們的大愛，

en: even when we were dead in our trespasses, made us alive together with Christ- by grace you have been saved-
zh: 就在我們因過犯死了的時候，使我們與基督一同活過來，

en: and raised us up with him and seated us with him in the heavenly places in Christ Jesus,
zh: 又使我們在基督耶穌裡，與他一同復活，一同坐在天上，

en: so that in the coming ages he might show the immeasurable riches of his grace in kindness toward us in Christ Jesus.
zh: 為的是要在將來的世代中，顯明他在基督耶穌裡賜給我們的恩典，是多麼的豐盛。

en: For by grace you have been saved through faith. And this is not your own doing; it is the gift of God,
zh: 你們得救是靠著恩典，藉著信心。這不是出於自己，而是 神所賜的；

en: not a result of works, so that no one may boast.
zh: 這也不是出於行為，免得有人自誇。

en: For we are his workmanship, created in Christ Jesus for good works, which God prepared beforehand, that we should walk in them.
zh: 我們原是 神所作成的，是在基督耶穌裡創造的，為的是要我們行各樣的善事，就是 神預先所安排的。

en: Therefore remember that at one time you Gentiles in the flesh, called "the uncircumcision" by what is called the circumcision, which is made in the flesh by hands-
zh: 你們應當記得，你們從前按肉體來說是外族人；那些所謂在肉體上受過人手所行的割禮的人，稱你們為未受割禮的。

en: remember that you were at that time separated from Christ, alienated from the commonwealth of Israel and strangers to the covenants of promise, having no hope and without God in the world.
zh: 那時，你們是在基督以外，與以色列國無分，在帶有應許的約上是外人，在世上沒有盼望，沒有 神。

en: But now in Christ Jesus you who once were far off have been brought near by the blood of Christ.
zh: 你們從前遠離的人，現今在基督耶穌裡，靠著他的血已經可以親近了。

en: For he himself is our peace, who has made us both one and has broken down in his flesh the dividing wall of hostility
zh: 基督就是我們的和平：他使雙方合而為一，拆毀了隔在中間的牆，就是以自己的身體除掉雙方的仇恨，

en: by abolishing the law of commandments and ordinances, that he might create in himself one new man in place of the two, so making peace,
zh: 並且廢掉了律法的規條，使兩者在他裡面成為一個新人，這樣就締造了和平。

en: and might reconcile us both to God in one body through the cross, thereby killing the hostility.
zh: 基督既然藉著十字架消滅了仇恨，就藉著十字架使雙方與 神和好，成為一體，

en: And he came and preached peace to you who were far off and peace to those who were near.
zh: 並且他來把和平的福音傳給你們在遠處的人，也給在近處的人。

en: For through him we both have access in one Spirit to the Father.
zh: 我們雙方都藉著他，在同一位聖靈裡，可以進到父面前。

en: So then you are no longer strangers and aliens, but you are fellow citizens with the saints and members of the household of God,
zh: 這樣看來，你們不再是外人和客旅，而是與聖徒一同作國民，是 神家裡的人了，

en: built on the foundation of the apostles and prophets, Christ Jesus himself being the cornerstone,
zh: 並且建造在使徒和先知的根基上，基督耶穌自己就是奠基石，

en: in whom the whole structure, being joined together, grows into a holy temple in the Lord.
zh: 整座建築都靠著他連接配合，漸漸增長成為在主裡面的聖所。

en: In him you also are being built together into a dwelling place for God by the Spirit.
zh: 你們在他裡面也一同被建造，成為 神藉著聖靈居住的所在。
